steps.title: Use the per-person column
steps.content: The question asks for the average amount contributed by each individual employed in wholesale trade. That means the relevant table entry is the per-employed-person value, not a total contribution or employee count.

steps.title: Read the wholesale trade row
steps.content: In the table, wholesale trade has 183,790 dollars in the average contribution per employed person column. Choice A is a different industry's average, while Choices C and D do not give the wholesale-trade per-person amount. The answer is B.
